Name: RavenDB - Create File System
Description: Used to create a new file system on a server

Parameters.Name: ravenFileSystemURL
Parameters.Label: URL of RavenDB
Parameters.HelpText:
URL of the RavenDB, where you would like the file system to be created. 

For example **http://localhost:8080/**

Parameters.Name: ravenFileSystemName
Parameters.Label: Name of the File System
Parameters.HelpText: Name the new File System will be called. Make sure the name is not being used already within this instance of RavenDB

Parameters.Name: ravenActiveBundles
Parameters.Label: Active Bundles
Parameters.HelpText: A settings option, Active Bundles refers bundles that RavenDB has (Replication;Versioning; etc)

Parameters.Name: ravenDataDir
Parameters.Label: Path for the database directory
Parameters.HelpText: The path for the database directory on the server

Parameters.Name: allowIncrementalBackups
Parameters.Label: Allow Incremental Backups
Parameters.HelpText: Allow Incremental Backups to be perform on this Database

Parameters.Name: voronTempPath
Parameters.Label: Path to Temporary Files
Parameters.HelpText: A different path where the temporary files will be stored

Parameters.Name: esentLogsPath
Parameters.Label: Path for the Esent Logs
Parameters.HelpText: The path for the Esent logs

Parameters.Name: indexStoragePath
Parameters.Label: Path for the Indexes
Parameters.HelpText: The path for the indexes on a disk, if you want to store the indexes on another HDD for performance reasons
